Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 1, 071 [Šumma Izbu 21][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

BE iz-bu munusANŠE.KUR.RA ki-ma UR.A [...]

If a mare's anomaly (is) like an otter [...].

o 22

BE iz-bu munusANŠE.KUR.RA ki-ma GIŠ [...]

If a mare's anomaly (is) like [...].

o 33

BE iz-bu munusANŠE.KUR.RA 7 EME-ME-šu₂ [...]

If a mare's anomaly - its 7 tongues [...].

o 44

BE iz-bu munusANŠE.KUR.RA 5 IGI-MEŠ-šu₂ 2 EME-[ME-šu₂ ...]

If a mare's anomaly (has) 5 eyes, its 2 tongues [...].

o 55

BE iz-bu munusANŠE.KUR.RA 1 IGI-<<MEŠ>>-šu₂ 2 ⸢EME⸣-[ME-šu₂ ...]

If a mare's anomaly (has) 1 eye, its 2 tongues [...].

o 66

BE iz-bu munusANŠE.KUR.RA 6 GIR₃-MEŠ-šu₂ 2 ⸢SAG⸣.DU [...]

If a mare's anomaly (has) 6 feet and 2 heads [...].

o 77

BE iz-bu munusANŠE.KUR.RA GIR₃-ME-šu₂ la₃ GAL₂-[ME ...]

If (on) a mare's anomaly, there are no feet [...].

o 88

BE iz-bu munusANŠE.KUR.RA GIR₃-ME-šu₂ ina pa-pan ⸢lib₃⸣-[bi-šu₂ ...]

If the feet of a mare's anomaly are on its diaphragm [...].

o 99

BE iz-bu munusANŠE.KUR.RA GIR₃-ME-šu₂ pu-us-su-la [...]

If the feet of a mare's anomaly are crippled [...].

o 1010

BE iz-bu munusANŠE.KUR.RA GIR₃-MEŠ-šu₂ GIM ša₂ UR.MAḪ [...] SIG₂ ŠAḪ GAR KUN la₃ TUKU LUGAL ZI-ma UGU KUR KUR₂-šu₂ [...]

If the feet of a mare's anomaly are like those of a lion, pig's hair is located (on) [...] and it has no tail: a king will arise and [...] over his enemy's land.

o 1111

BE iz-bu munusANŠE.KUR.RA <GIR₃-MEŠ-šu₂> GIM ša₂ UR.MAḪ ⸢SAG⸣.[DU ...]

If the feet of a mare's anomaly is like that of a lion, the head [...].

o 1212

BE iz-bu munusANŠE.KUR.RA 2 SAG.DU-MEŠ-šu₂ 2 ⸢KUN⸣-[MEŠ-šu₂ ...]

If a mare's anomaly (has) 2 heads (and) 2 tails [...].

o 1313

BE iz-bu munusANŠE.KUR.RA 2 SAG.DU-MEŠ-šu₂ 2 GIR₃-[ME-šu₂ ...]

If a mare's anomaly (has) 2 heads (and) 2 feet [...].

o 1414

BE iz-bu munusANŠE.KUR.RA GIR₃-MEŠ-šu₂ ina EGIR-šu₂ [...]

If the feet of a mare's anomaly (are) in its back [...].

(catchline)
r 3535

BE munusŠAḪ 1 U₃.TU [...]

If a sow gives birth to one (piglet) [...]

(colophon)
r 3636

ŠU.NIGIN 1 UŠ 17-AM₃ MU-DIDLI IM ⸢21⸣-[KAM BE iz-bu]

Total: 1 sixty 17 lines; tablet 21 (of the series) ["If an anomaly" ...].

r 3737

GABA.RI TIR.AN.<<AN>>.NAki SAR-ma ⸢ba⸣-[ri]
